name: O-3 plugin lifecycle: uninstall-cleanup never auto-deletes evidence or audit-log paths per §13 O-3
command: grep -q 'PROTECTED=(compliance/evidence compliance/audit-checkpoints)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" && grep -q 'refusing to remove protected path' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/uninstall-cleanup.sh" && echo evidence_protected 1>&2
